    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Customer
     
    CustomerController
    Controller responsible for handling all customer-related web requests.
    CustomerRepository
     
    CustomerService
     
    CustomerServiceImpl
    Service implementation responsible for handling customer-related business logic.
    HomeController
    Controller responsible for handling navigation to core application pages such as login and dashboard.
    Inventory
     
    InventoryappApplication
     
    InventoryController
    Controller responsible for handling inventory-related operations.
    InventoryRepository
     
    InventoryService
     
    InventoryServiceImpl
    Service implementation responsible for handling inventory-related business logic.
    OrderController
    Controller responsible for handling order-related operations.
    OrderForm
     
    OrderHeader
     
    OrderHeaderRepository
     
    OrderItem
     
    OrderItemRepository
     
    OrderService
     
    OrderServiceImpl
    Service implementation responsible for handling order-related business logic.
    Product
     
    ProductController
    Controller responsible for handling product-related operations.
    ProductRepository
     
    ProductService
     
    ProductServiceImpl
    Service implementation responsible for handling product-related business logic.
    ReportsController
    Controller responsible for generating application reports.
